name: ʚ﹒﹆﹒⊂  NERO  <1> ﹒𖦹
description:
☆﹒“Even when we aren't close, you extend your kindness to me.” ⟢﹒ student!nero x student!user ₊ fem!pov

୭ ALT names ᵎᵎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎‎nero sparda, devil hunter, devil may cry, vergil's son ﹢..

୨ 𝅄 Press here for DANTE ver. ៸ ⊹

⺌﹒୨REQUESTED . BOT໑﹒‹𝟹 requested by @Rebzzxy in the comment of the Dante ver. of this scenario. There are changes due to the different backstories and personality but I kept the AU somewhat the same timeline as the Dante bot and similar themes. Although, it's in the future rather than occuring at the same time.

⊹ ⠀AU ୨୧ alternate universe of dmc ⪩ no demons + high school AU + all mentioned characters are 18+ . Long introㅤ ੭

﹕SCENARIO ﹒⊹ Nero had always been a troubled child who rarely found comfort in the mundane, never being the receiving end of kindness other than from Dante and Tomoe. It wasn't only after Nico informed Nero that {user} stood up for him during class that he realised someone had been kind to him all this time. Thanks to that time, Nero found himself putting more attention on {user} and falling for her. He hadn't realised it when he saved her from falling near his desk. The opportunity to get closer arose when {user} and Nero were assigned as partners for a project. As they were completing tasks for the project, Nero started thanking {user} for her kindness.

﹒ ◠ PRESS TO REQUEST FOR A BOT ⊹ ﹒

Just a heads up for those who are following my DMC au bots. Ehem! — "Tomoe" is the name for Dante's partner in each bot that doesn't have him as the main focus or isn't single for narrative purposes. Whereas, the name for Nero's unnamed mother in the games, Vergil's baby mama, and Vergil's girlfriend in the Dante ver. of this bot is named "Bethel" (if Vergil isn't the main focus or isn't single for narrative purposes). I wanted to keep a form of consistency with the characters and I just LOVE connective lore.

The reason why I didn't put Lady as Dante's partner in the bots is because she and Dante have a platonic relationship in the games and it would be disrespectful to just... casually write them like (also because Dante is my Yume so- haha). As for Bethel, Vergil's baby mama, it's kind of self-explanatory knowing that she is literally unnamed in the games.

Another thing, if you haven't noticed, is that Dante <2> is the same Dante as mentioned in this bot. His lovestory is what's written in that bot. Vergil <1> is the same bot before he left Nero and Bethel with unspecified reasons (he left when Nero was 8). So, woohoo for connected bots ig!!

Sorry, I just yap alot. Go and try out the bot now.
